description: Sector-material E/S characteristic categories for data-centre projects. Used by SFDR criterion 1 (E/S characteristics promotion) to discriminate sector-material from generic. The 'aligned' band requires ≥2 of the ≥3 disclosed characteristics to fall into this category set.
extensibility_note: Adding a category requires a methodology-doc entry justifying the data-centre materiality, with a citation to either a recognised standard or a regulatory anchor. Extending this list per-sector (e.g. for renewables, transport) happens in future regime-scoped constants files (e.g. renewables_sector_material_categories.json).
